title: 90% of Traders Get This Wrong — Do You Know the Answer?
description: Quiz time 🧠 Most traders fail this one question about Fair Value Gaps — and it's costing them funded accounts. Test yourself and see if you really understand smart money concepts. Drop your answer in the comments! Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT breakdowns. r2ftrading.com
script: Stop. Before your next trade — answer this. 90% of traders fail it. What makes a Fair Value Gap VALID for an entry? Think fast. Is it: A — Any three-candle gap on the chart. B — A gap left during an impulse move WITH market structure shift. C — Any gap near a support level. Which one? The answer is B. A valid FVG needs an impulse move AND a market structure shift. Without both — you're just gambling into random gaps. That's why funded accounts get blown. We drill setups like this every single week at R2F Trading. Follow us. Don't trade another FVG blind. r2ftrading.com — link in bio.
